tasks.title: Update MCP server with tool registrations
tasks.description: Register 4 new MCP tools in mcp-server/src/index.ts: sf360-test-plan, sf360-test-generate, sf360-test-evaluate, sf360-test-report. Implement prompt loading and variable injection.
acceptanceCriteria: mcp-server/src/index.ts updated with 4 new tool definitions
Tool names: sf360-test-plan, sf360-test-generate, sf360-test-evaluate, sf360-test-report
Each tool has input schema defined
Prompt loading reads from templates/prompts/*.md files
Tool handlers return prompts to Claude

tasks.title: Create test-plan tool prompt
tasks.description: Create test-plan-prompt.md with instructions for Claude to parse user specs, detect pages, check requirements, explore with Playwright MCP, and generate plan JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: Instructions for parsing user test specification
Instructions for page detection from menu-mapping.json
Instructions for Playwright MCP usage (browser_navigate, browser_snapshot)
Instructions for selector extraction (buttons, inputs, tables)
Instructions for plan JSON structure generation

tasks.title: Create test-generate tool prompt
tasks.description: Create test-generate-prompt.md with instructions for Claude to read plan JSON and generate executable Playwright test with setupTest() call.
acceptanceCriteria: Instructions for reading plan JSON file
Instructions for test file header generation (with plan reference)
Instructions for setupTest() call generation with pageKey
Instructions for test data variable generation
Instructions for converting plan steps to Playwright code
Instructions for assertion generation from expected outcomes

tasks.title: Create test-evaluate tool prompt
tasks.description: Create test-evaluate-prompt.md with prompt-based debugging instructions for Claude to run tests, debug with Playwright MCP, and fix iteratively.
acceptanceCriteria: Instructions for running test with npx playwright test
Instructions for debugging with Playwright MCP (browser_snapshot, browser_navigate)
Instructions for fixing test code iteratively
Smart limits defined: max 20 attempts total, max 5 per error type
Instructions for mandatory check-in at 10 attempts
Instructions for stopping if same error 3x in a row

tasks.title: Create test-report tool prompt
tasks.description: Create test-report-prompt.md with instructions for Claude to generate comprehensive markdown reports for test results.
acceptanceCriteria: Instructions for reading test file and plan file
Instructions for providing actionable next steps

tasks.title: Create orchestration documentation
tasks.description: Document how Claude should orchestrate the 4-tool workflow: when to call each tool, error handling strategies, and progress communication.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation explains tool call sequence: plan → generate → evaluate → report
Documentation explains when to stop vs continue vs retry
Documentation explains error handling for each phase
Documentation includes decision tree for Claude
Can be integrated into base.md or as separate guide
